data.title: Wolverine Basic Plan
data.description: 5GB data, unlimited calls & texts. Perfect for light users who want reliable coverage without breaking the bank.

data.title: Wolverine Pro Plan
data.description: 25GB data, unlimited calls & texts, plus 5G access. Great for streaming and staying connected on the go.

data.title: Wolverine Unlimited Plan
data.description: Unlimited data, calls & texts with premium 5G and hotspot. Our best plan for power users.

data.title: WolverinePhone Alpha
data.description: 6.5" AMOLED display, 128GB storage, 48MP triple camera. A flagship experience at mid-range pricing.

data.title: WolverinePhone Lite
data.description: 6.1" LCD display, 64GB storage, 12MP dual camera. Affordable and dependable for everyday use.

data.title: WolverinePhone Max
data.description: 6.7" AMOLED 120Hz, 256GB storage, 108MP quad camera, 5000mAh battery. The ultimate flagship.

data.title: Wolverine Armor Case
data.description: Military-grade drop protection with a slim profile. Available for all WolverinePhone models.

data.title: Wolverine Fast Charger
data.description: 65W GaN USB-C charger with quick charge support. Charge your phone to 50% in just 15 minutes.

data.title: Wolverine Wireless Buds
data.description: Active noise cancellation, 8-hour battery life, IPX5 water resistance. Premium sound on the go.

data.title: Wolverine Screen Shield
data.description: Tempered glass screen protector with 9H hardness. Crystal clear with anti-fingerprint coating.
